NULL, `pillPhysicalDefenseBonus` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pillMagicDefenseBonus` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pillHpBonus` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pillMpBonus` INTEGER NOT NULL, `pillSpeedBonus` INTEGER NOT NULL,
